meaning: n.水中听音器,水诊器,检漏器
examples: Fiber optic hydrophone unit was the basis of fiber optic hydrophone system.
The hydrophone records from the deep waters where they spend most of their time revealed them to be much more common.
The hydrophone is constructed with a pressure hydrophone and particle velocity hydrophone, and is called combined hydrophone.
During the survey work, an underwater microphone called a hydrophone will be used to record the high frequency sounds of harbour porpoises and white-beaked dolphins for analysis.
